news.t: Healthcare ETFs: From Broad Exposure to Big Breakthroughs
LLY Clears Major Obesity Trial: Get Exposure in THNR
Why Investors Haven't Feasted on Two New Weight-Loss ETFs

holdings.infoBox: THNR is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novo Nordisk stock at 14.42%, Eli Lilly and Company at 14.42%, Amgen at 6.34%, Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals at 6.12%, and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals at 5.48%.

overview.description: The Amplify Weight Loss Drug & Treatment ETF (THNR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a modified market cap-weighted index of companies from developed markets that manufacture and enable GLP-1 agonist pharmaceutical businesses. THNR was launched on May 21, 2024 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: SILJ, HACK, THNR: Trends in Thematic Investing
data.text: Amplify Junior Silver Miners ETF (SILJ) is up 28% year-to-date. Christian Magoon discusses the outlook for cybersecurity stocks, as Amplify's Cybersecurity ETF (HACK) is up 8% year-to-date.

data.title: Why Investors Haven't Feasted on Two New Weight-Loss ETFs
data.text: Two new weight-loss exchange-traded funds (ETFs) launched in May have yet to whet investors' appetite, possibly due to their expensive fees and concentrated bets.
